industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.subtitle: Engineered bearing solutions for the most demanding operating environments across global heavy industry.
industries.introText: ANDE Precision Bearing supplies high-performance bearings to a wide range of industrial sectors worldwide. With over 7 years of manufacturing and export experience, we understand the unique operational demands of each industry. Our engineering team works closely with procurement managers and maintenance engineers to recommend the right bearing type, material, and configuration for every application. Whether you operate continuous casters in a steel mill, vibrating screens in a mine, or high-speed spindles in a CNC workshop, we deliver bearings that perform reliably under the toughest conditions.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose ANDE for Your Industry

experience.title: 7+ Years Industry Experience
experience.description: We have supplied bearings to steel mills, mining companies, power plants, and OEM manufacturers across more than 50 countries. Our team understands your operational requirements and procurement timelines.

customization.title: Application-Specific Solutions
customization.description: Not every application fits a standard catalog bearing. We offer custom clearance configurations, special materials, coatings, and sealing options tailored to your specific operating environment and load conditions.

supply.title: Reliable Global Supply Chain
supply.description: With annual production capacity exceeding 5 million units and a dedicated export logistics team, we ensure consistent supply with FOB, CIF, and DDP delivery terms to meet your project schedules.

industries.ctaTitle: Need bearings for your specific application?
industries.ctaDescription: Our engineering team provides free technical consultation for bearing selection, sizing, and material recommendations. Get a response within 24 hours.

steel.name: Steel & Rolling Mills
steel.description: Heavy-duty spherical roller bearings and tapered roller bearings for continuous casters, rolling mills, and material handling in steel production. Our bearings are designed to withstand extreme heat, heavy shock loads, and continuous operation cycles typical in integrated steel plants. We supply work roll bearings, backup roll bearings, and conveyor bearings for hot strip mills, cold rolling mills, and plate mills.
steel.bearingTypes: Spherical roller bearings (22200–24100 series), tapered roller bearings, cylindrical roller bearings, and self-aligning ball bearings for auxiliary equipment.

mining.name: Mining & Minerals
mining.description: Robust bearings for crushers, conveyors, vibrating screens, and processing equipment in harsh mining environments. Mining operations demand bearings that resist heavy shock loads, abrasive dust ingress, and moisture contamination. ANDE bearings for mining applications feature enhanced sealing, hardened raceways, and optimized internal geometry for extended maintenance intervals in remote locations.
mining.bearingTypes: Spherical roller bearings, tapered roller bearings, pillow block mounted units, and heavy-duty ball bearings for conveyor idlers.

energy.name: Energy & Power Generation
energy.description: Specialized bearings for wind turbines, generators, pumps, and compressors in conventional and renewable energy applications. From wind turbine main shaft bearings to generator bearings in thermal power plants, ANDE provides precision-engineered components rated for long service life, minimal friction, and reliable performance in demanding energy infrastructure applications.
energy.bearingTypes: Spherical roller bearings for wind turbines, deep groove ball bearings for motors, tapered roller bearings for gearboxes, and cylindrical roller bearings for generators.

automotive.name: Automotive & Transport
automotive.description: High-performance bearings for wheel hubs, transmissions, engines, and drivetrain components for automotive OEMs and aftermarket. ANDE supplies precision-grade tapered roller bearings and deep groove ball bearings that meet the tight tolerance requirements of automotive applications, supporting high-speed operation, low noise, and extended service intervals demanded by modern vehicles.
automotive.bearingTypes: Tapered roller bearings for wheel hubs, deep groove ball bearings for alternators and water pumps, angular contact ball bearings for transmissions.

manufacturing.name: General Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Reliable bearings for machine tools, conveyor systems, packaging equipment, and general industrial machinery. Manufacturing environments require bearings that deliver consistent precision, quiet operation, and long service life across diverse applications ranging from high-speed spindles to heavy-duty conveyors. ANDE provides a full range of standard and application-specific bearings for the manufacturing sector.
manufacturing.bearingTypes: Deep groove ball bearings, linear guide systems, mounted bearing units, angular contact ball bearings for spindles, and miniature bearings for precision instruments.

agriculture.name: Agriculture & Forestry
agriculture.description: Durable bearings for tractors, harvesters, tillers, and agricultural processing equipment operating in dusty, wet conditions. Agricultural machinery operates in some of the harshest environments, with exposure to dirt, moisture, crop residue, and extreme temperature swings. ANDE agricultural bearings feature robust sealing systems and corrosion-resistant treatments for reliable, maintenance-friendly operation throughout the growing season.
agriculture.bearingTypes: Mounted bearing units (pillow block, flange), deep groove ball bearings with seals, spherical roller bearings for heavy equipment, and disc harrow bearings.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Comprehensive range of precision bearings and motion components, manufactured to international standards with full dimensional and material traceability.

ballBearings.name: Ball Bearings
ballBearings.description: Deep groove, angular contact, and self-aligning ball bearings for high-speed and precision applications.
ballBearings.overview: Ball bearings are one of the most widely used bearing types in modern industrial and commercial machinery. They use spherical rolling elements positioned between an inner and outer raceway to reduce rotational friction and support both radial and axial loads. ANDE manufactures a comprehensive range of ball bearings suitable for applications from small electric motors and household appliances to large industrial pumps and conveyor systems. Our ball bearings are manufactured from premium chrome steel (AISI 52100) or stainless steel (AISI 440C), with precision-ground raceways and optimized internal geometry for smooth, quiet operation and extended service life. Available in open, shielded, and sealed configurations with various cage materials including pressed steel and polyamide. All ball bearings conform to ISO 15:2017 dimensional standards and are available in precision classes from P0 (standard) through P5 for demanding high-speed applications.
keyFeatures: High-speed capability with low friction torque
Available in bore diameters from 3mm to 200mm
Multiple seal and shield configurations for contamination protection
Chrome steel and stainless steel material options
Precision classes: P0, P6, P5 to meet diverse application needs
Conformance to ISO 15:2017 and ISO 492 standards

rollerBearings.name: Roller Bearings
rollerBearings.description: Tapered, spherical, cylindrical, and needle roller bearings for heavy radial and axial load applications.
rollerBearings.overview: Roller bearings use cylindrical, tapered, or spherical rolling elements to carry heavier loads than ball bearings of comparable size. The line contact between rollers and raceways distributes stress over a larger area, enabling roller bearings to support substantial radial forces, axial thrust loads, or combined loads depending on the design. ANDE offers a comprehensive selection of roller bearings engineered for the most demanding heavy industrial environments including steel mills, mining operations, power generation facilities, and large-scale manufacturing plants. Our roller bearing product line includes tapered roller bearings for combined load applications, spherical roller bearings with self-aligning capability for installations with shaft deflection or misalignment, and cylindrical roller bearings for high radial load capacity. All roller bearings are manufactured from high-quality bearing steel with precision-machined raceways, heat-treated components, and carefully selected cage designs for optimal performance and durability under extreme operating conditions.
keyFeatures: Superior load capacity compared to ball bearings of equivalent size
Tapered, spherical, and cylindrical roller configurations available
Self-aligning designs accommodate up to 2 degrees of misalignment
Bore diameter range from 15mm to 400mm for diverse applications
Manufactured to ISO 355, ISO 15:2017, and ISO 492 standards

deep-groove-ball-bearing.name: Deep Groove Ball Bearing
deep-groove-ball-bearing.description: Versatile bearing type suitable for high-speed applications with radial and axial loads in both directions.
deep-groove-ball-bearing.overview: Our Deep Groove Ball Bearings are designed for high speed and precision applications requiring excellent axial and radial load capacity. They feature low friction and high rotational accuracy, making them ideal for electric motors, pumps, and various industrial machinery.
features: Low friction design for efficient operation
High speed capability up to 17,000 RPM
Available with various sealing and lubrication options

specifications.type: Single Row Deep Groove Ball Bearing

tapered-roller-bearing.name: Tapered Roller Bearing
tapered-roller-bearing.description: Designed to handle combined radial and axial loads with tapered raceways for heavy-duty applications.
tapered-roller-bearing.overview: Tapered Roller Bearings handle combined radial and axial loads simultaneously. The tapered design creates line contact between rollers and raceways, providing high load capacity and excellent resistance to axial forces.
features: Available in single, double, and four-row configurations
applications: Automotive wheel hubs and axle assemblies
Rolling mill work rolls and backup rolls

spherical-roller-bearing.name: Spherical Roller Bearing
spherical-roller-bearing.description: Self-aligning bearings with high load capacity for applications with misalignment or shaft deflection.
spherical-roller-bearing.overview: Spherical Roller Bearings are self-aligning bearings designed for heavy loads while accommodating misalignment up to 2 degrees, shaft deflection, and thermal expansion.
features: Self-aligning capability: up to 2 degrees misalignment
Compact design with high load-to-size ratio
Extended service life with proper lubrication
applications: Steel mill rolling equipment and continuous casters
Mining crushers, conveyors, and vibrating screens
Wind turbine main shaft and gearbox

about.title: About ANDE Precision Bearing
about.subtitle: Over 7 years of precision bearing manufacturing for global industrial markets.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 2019, Jiangsu ANDE Precision Bearing Technology Co., Ltd. has grown from a specialized local manufacturer to a global supplier of precision bearings. Located in Jiangyin, Jiangsu Province, we combine decades of metallurgical expertise with modern CNC manufacturing technology.
story.p2: Our facility spans over 15,000 m2 with dedicated production lines for ball bearings, roller bearings, and mounted units. We serve distributors, steel mills, mining operations, and OEM procurement teams in more than 50 countries.
story.p3: Our commitment to quality, technical accuracy, and reliable delivery has earned us long-term partnerships with major industrial buyers across Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Europe, and the Americas.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: Every bearing passes multi-stage quality inspection. We maintain ISO 9001:2015 certification and conform to international dimensional and tolerance standards.

innovation.title: Continuous Improvement
innovation.description: We invest in advanced grinding, superfinishing, and assembly equipment to improve precision, consistency, and production efficiency.

service.title: Customer Partnership
service.description: We function as an extension of your procurement team, providing technical support, responsive communication, and reliable supply chain performance.

quality.title: Quality Assurance & Certifications
quality.subtitle: Rigorous quality control at every stage of production ensures our bearings meet the highest international standards.

items: Products conform to ISO, JIS, ABEC, DIN standards
CE marking available for European market requirements

steps.title: Incoming Material Inspection
steps.description: Chemical composition analysis, hardness testing, and metallurgical structure verification of all raw steel materials.

steps.title: In-Process Dimensional Inspection
steps.description: Continuous monitoring of bore, OD, width, and raceway geometry using precision measuring instruments during production.

steps.title: Surface & Roundness Measurement
steps.description: Roundness, waviness, and surface roughness measurements on critical raceway and rolling element surfaces.

steps.title: Final Audit & Testing
steps.description: 100% inspection for noise, vibration, radial clearance, and rotational accuracy before packaging and shipment.

services.title: Technical Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive bearing support from application engineering to failure analysis.
services.introText: At ANDE Precision Bearing, we go beyond manufacturing. Our experienced engineering team provides end-to-end technical support to help you select the right bearing, optimize installation procedures, and maximize service life. Whether you are designing a new machine, replacing failed bearings, or seeking to reduce maintenance costs, our technical services team is ready to assist. We combine field experience from serving heavy industries worldwide with deep product knowledge to deliver practical, actionable recommendations.
services.ctaText: Ready to discuss your bearing requirements? Our engineers respond within 24 hours with technical recommendations tailored to your application.

steps.title: Inquiry & Assessment
steps.description: Share your application details, operating conditions, and requirements with our team.

steps.title: Engineering Review
steps.description: Our engineers analyze load, speed, environment, and alignment factors to recommend optimal solutions.

steps.title: Proposal & Samples
steps.description: Receive a detailed quotation with specifications. Request samples for testing and validation.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.description: After delivery, we provide installation guidance, maintenance advice, and warranty support.

consultation.title: Technical Consultation
consultation.description: Expert guidance on bearing selection based on your application requirements.
consultation.detail: Choosing the right bearing is critical to equipment performance and longevity. Our engineers evaluate your operating parameters including radial and axial loads, rotational speed, temperature range, environmental contaminants, and space constraints. We then recommend the optimal bearing type, size, clearance class, material, and lubrication method. This service is available free of charge for all prospective and existing customers.

installation.title: Installation & Maintenance Support
installation.description: Professional guidance for bearing installation, alignment, and preventive maintenance.
installation.detail: Improper installation is one of the leading causes of premature bearing failure. Our team provides detailed mounting instructions, recommended fitting practices, and alignment verification procedures for every bearing type we supply. We also help you develop preventive maintenance schedules including relubrication intervals, condition monitoring checkpoints, and replacement criteria to minimize unplanned downtime.

failureAnalysis.title: Failure Analysis
failureAnalysis.description: Systematic investigation of bearing failures to identify root causes and prevent recurrence.
failureAnalysis.detail: When a bearing fails prematurely, understanding the root cause is essential to prevent future issues. Our failure analysis service examines failed bearings to identify damage patterns such as fatigue spalling, brinelling, corrosion, contamination, misalignment wear, or inadequate lubrication. We provide a detailed report with findings and corrective action recommendations to improve bearing life in your application.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions from distributors, procurement managers, and engineers.

items.question: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
items.answer: MOQ varies by bearing type and size. For standard catalog items, typical MOQ is 50-100 pieces. For non-standard or customized bearings, please contact our sales team for specific quantities.

items.question: What are your standard lead times?
items.answer: Standard catalog bearings: 2-4 weeks from order confirmation. Non-standard or large-quantity orders: 4-8 weeks. Express delivery can be arranged for urgent requirements.

items.question: Do you provide OEM/ODM services?
items.answer: Yes. We offer custom branding, specific packaging, and bearing modifications including non-standard dimensions, special materials, coatings, and clearance configurations.

items.question: What certifications do your bearings carry?
items.answer: Our manufacturing facility is ISO 9001:2015 certified. Products conform to ISO, JIS, ABEC, and DIN dimensional and tolerance standards. We provide Certificates of Conformity with every shipment.

items.question: What payment terms do you accept?
items.answer: We accept T/T (wire transfer), L/C (letter of credit), and Western Union. Standard terms: 30% deposit upon order confirmation, 70% balance against copy of B/L.

items.question: How is the bearing quality compared to known brands?
items.answer: Our bearings are manufactured from the same grade of bearing steel (GCr15/AISI 52100) used by major international brands. We follow the same ISO dimensional and tolerance standards.

items.question: Can you provide bearing samples?
items.answer: Yes. We provide samples for testing and evaluation. Standard catalog items can typically ship within 5-7 business days. Sample costs are usually applied to the first production order.

items.question: What export packaging do you use?
items.answer: Bearings are individually wrapped with anti-rust paper and VCI film, then packed in industrial cartons or wooden cases suitable for ocean freight. Custom packaging available.
